chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Bail Appl No.2788 of 2024 (Fayaz Ali Leghari vs. The State) 24.12.2024 Mr. Ali Gul, Advocate for applicant a/w applicant Mr. Hakim Ali Khan, advocate for complainant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Addl: PG Sindh a/w SIP/IO Haji Khan Sachal Goth, Karachi O R D E R ------ Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- After arguing the matter at some length, when learned counsel for the applicant has failed to satisfy the Court regarding relief of pre-arrest bail to the applicant, he and applicant himself have undertaken that the Car bearing Registration No.BARV-BG-2895, Model-2017, colored Black, Chassis No.NFBD-9183BHR000850 would be returned to the complainant within 05 days along with original file and TO-Form duly singed for transferring the same to the complainant’s name. 2. On such undertaking, with consent this application is allowed and ad- interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant vide order dated 29.11.2024 is confirmed on same terms and conditions. However, if within 05 days the car is not returned along with original file and TO-Form duly signed by the applicant to the complainant, this bail application would be deemed to have been dismissed and the trial Court and IO would be competent to take action against the applicant including his arrest. J U D G E Rafiq/P.A.
